total_transactions.label: Total Transactions
total_transactions.definition: Number of rows in the raw simulated transaction dataset.

fraud_rate.label: Fraud Rate
fraud_rate.definition: Confirmed fraud transactions divided by all transactions.

pr_auc.label: PR-AUC
pr_auc.definition: Average precision score; primary metric for extreme class imbalance.

top_k_capture.label: Top-K Fraud Capture
top_k_capture.definition: Fraud cases captured when reviewing the highest-risk ranked transactions.

risk_score.label: Fraud Risk Score
risk_score.definition: Predicted fraud probability scaled from 0 to 1000 for investigation queue readability.
